name: AI Viral Video Script Generator
description: Takes a video concept, uses Claude AI to generate creative viral video scripts with scene-by-scene descriptions, hooks, and platform-specific variations for TikTok/YouTube Shorts/Reels. Saves the full production plan to Google Sheets and notifies Slack.

source.originalName: Generate AI viral videos with Seedance and upload to TikTok, YouTube & Instagram

videoConcept.description: Video concept or topic (e.g. 'satisfying ASMR cooking video with sizzling sounds')

videoCount.description: Number of video variations to generate (1-5)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post notification

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for viral video script generation
Run Claude AI to generate viral video scripts
Strip code fences and parse Claude JSON output
Build Google Sheets data from video scripts
Save production plan to Google Sheets
Post video scripts summary to Slack
